title: Global Economic Activity And World Trade Strengthened
section_path: Global Economic Activity And World Trade Strengthened
section_path_text: Global Economic Activity And World Trade Strengthened
summary:
Main
Analysts suggest that the primary driver of China's commodity imports is price, with economic conditions playing only a secondary role. By Michalis Voutsinas
Typically, late July's dry bulk shipping reports are vibrant, filled with speculations on the Baltic indices' peaks. However, this year has been an anomaly, with such discussions vanishing into obscurity.
